select `user_exams`.`id` as `exam_id`, `users`.`id`, `users`.`name`, `users`.`email`, `users`.`gender`, `users`.`age`, `users`.`shortlist`, `users`.`created_at`, `users`.`userId` as `userId`, `user_exams`.`user_id`, `user_exams`.`exam_id`, `user_exams`.`exam_joined`, `user_exams`.`submitted`, `user_admission`.`id` as `admitted`, CASE WHEN user_admission.id IS NOT NULL THEN "Admitted" ELSE "Not Admitted" END as admission_status, CASE WHEN user_admission.id IS NOT NULL THEN courses.course_name ELSE NULL END as course_name, CASE WHEN user_admission.id IS NOT NULL THEN course_sessions.name ELSE NULL END as session_name, `user_admission`.`session` as `session_id`, `courses`.`id` as `course_id` from `user_exams` inner join `users` on `users`.`id` = `user_exams`.`user_id` left join `user_admission` on `user_admission`.`user_id` = `users`.`userId` left join `courses` on `user_admission`.`course_id` = `courses`.`id` left join `course_sessions` on `user_admission`.`session` = `course_sessions`.`id` where `users`.`shortlist` = 1

select count(*) as aggregate from `user_exams` inner join `users` on `users`.`id` = `user_exams`.`user_id` left join `user_admission` on `user_admission`.`user_id` = `users`.`userId` left join `courses` on `user_admission`.`course_id` = `courses`.`id` left join `course_sessions` on `user_admission`.`session` = `course_sessions`.`id` where `users`.`shortlist` = 1

select `user_exams`.`id` as `exam_id`, `users`.`id`, `users`.`name`, `users`.`email`, `users`.`gender`, `users`.`age`, `users`.`shortlist`, `users`.`created_at`, `users`.`userId` as `userId`, `user_exams`.`user_id`, `user_exams`.`exam_id`, `user_exams`.`exam_joined`, `user_exams`.`submitted`, `user_admission`.`id` as `admitted`, CASE WHEN user_admission.id IS NOT NULL THEN "Admitted" ELSE "Not Admitted" END as admission_status, CASE WHEN user_admission.id IS NOT NULL THEN courses.course_name ELSE NULL END as course_name, CASE WHEN user_admission.id IS NOT NULL THEN course_sessions.name ELSE NULL END as session_name, `user_admission`.`session` as `session_id`, `courses`.`id` as `course_id` from `user_exams` inner join `users` on `users`.`id` = `user_exams`.`user_id` left join `user_admission` on `user_admission`.`user_id` = `users`.`userId` left join `courses` on `user_admission`.`course_id` = `courses`.`id` left join `course_sessions` on `user_admission`.`session` = `course_sessions`.`id` where `users`.`shortlist` = 1 order by `name` asc limit 10 offset 0
